parsed_output.justification: Inspection of the transcript indicates multiple players accusing James of being a werewolf, and several accounts refer to him as a suspect rather than an innocent player. Consequently, voting for James increases the likelihood of eliminating a werewolf, aligning with the goal of Team Village.
